food_subgroup: Beef burger with bun and condiments

ontology.foodon_gap_note: No FoodOn entry exists for Jollibee Deluxe Jolliburger specifically; FOODON_00002383 (hamburger) is the closest parent class covering beef patty in a bun.
ontology.foodex2_gap_note: FoodEx2 code A0FJP (Hamburger) is the closest parent; no brand-specific Jollibee entry exists in FoodEx2.
ontology.snomed_ct_gap_note: SNOMED CT 226789007 (Hamburger) is the closest parent concept; no brand-specific entry exists.

serving.natural_language_portion: One Deluxe Jolliburger Single Patty burger weighing approximately 185 g, consisting of a beef patty, toasted bun, lettuce, tomato, onion, cheese, and condiments.

nutrient_source.title: USDA FoodData Central — Hamburger, single patty, with condiments and vegetables (SR Legacy 21110)
nutrient_source.source_match_notes: Jollibee Deluxe Jolliburger Single Patty is a branded fast-food beef burger with condiments and vegetables. No exact entry exists in HPB Singapore Foodo or ICMR-NIN. USDA SR Legacy entry 21110 / FDC 173965 'Hamburger, single patty, with condiments and vegetables' is the closest defensible analogue. Values are adapted from this USDA entry. Serving size set to 185 g based on typical single-patty deluxe burger weight consistent with USDA reference portion.

gi_source.title: International tables of glycemic index and glycemic load values: 2008 — Hamburger bun / fast-food burger composite
gi_source.organization: University of Sydney GI Database / Atkinson FS, Foster-Powell K, Brand-Miller JC. Diabetes Care 2008;31(12):2281-2283.
gi_source.source_match_notes: No direct GI measurement exists for the Jollibee Deluxe Jolliburger. GI of 66 is estimated from the University of Sydney GI Database entry for a standard fast-food hamburger with bun and condiments (white bread bun GI ~70–75, mixed burger composite GI ~60–70). A composite GI of 66 (medium category) is used as the closest defensible analogous estimate. Glycemic load per serving calculated as (GI × carbohydrate_g per serving) / 100 = (66 × 49.0) / 100 ≈ 32.3, rounded to 32.5.

hypertension.key_factor: High sodium content (~490 mg per 100 g; ~906 mg per serving)
hypertension.guidance: Individuals with hypertension should limit or avoid this burger as a single serving provides approximately 906 mg sodium, representing nearly 40% of the WHO recommended daily limit of 2000 mg, and regular consumption may contribute to sustained blood pressure elevation.

type2_diabetes.key_factor: Medium-to-high glycemic load (~32.5 per serving) and refined carbohydrate from white bun
type2_diabetes.guidance: People with Type 2 Diabetes should consume this burger only occasionally and in controlled portions, as the refined white bun contributes a glycemic load of approximately 32.5 per serving, which can cause significant postprandial blood glucose elevation; pairing with non-starchy vegetables and avoiding sugary beverages is advised.

cardiovascular_disease.key_factor: Saturated fat (~3.8 g per 100 g), trans fat (~0.3 g per 100 g), and high sodium
cardiovascular_disease.guidance: Individuals with cardiovascular disease should limit consumption of this burger due to its saturated fat, trans fat, and high sodium content, all of which are associated with increased LDL cholesterol and blood pressure; occasional consumption as part of an otherwise heart-healthy diet may be acceptable.

llm_training.natural_language_description: The Deluxe Jolliburger Single Patty is a fast-food beef burger sold by Jollibee, a Filipino quick-service restaurant chain with outlets in Singapore including Bugis Village. The burger consists of a single seasoned beef patty grilled and served in a toasted sesame-seed bun, layered with fresh lettuce, tomato slices, onion, a slice of processed cheese, and condiments including mayonnaise, mustard, and ketchup. The 'Deluxe' designation distinguishes it from the standard Jolliburger by the inclusion of cheese and additional vegetable toppings. The beef patty is halal-certified in Singapore. The texture combines a soft, slightly sweet bun with a juicy, savoury beef patty and crisp vegetable toppings. Per 100 g, the burger provides approximately 254 kcal, 13.5 g protein, 10.5 g fat (3.8 g saturated), and 26.5 g carbohydrate. A typical serving of approximately 185 g delivers around 470 kcal and 906 mg sodium. Clinically, the high sodium content is a concern for individuals managing hypertension, the medium-to-high glycemic load is relevant for Type 2 Diabetes management, and the saturated fat and trans fat content warrants caution for cardiovascular disease patients. The burger is not suitable for vegetarians, vegans, or those with gluten, dairy, egg, or soy allergies.
common_user_queries: How many calories in a Jollibee Deluxe Jolliburger?
Is the Jolliburger halal in Singapore?
What is the sodium content of the Deluxe Jolliburger?
Is the Deluxe Jolliburger suitable for diabetics?
What are the macros in a Jollibee burger?
How much protein is in a Jolliburger single patty?
What is the glycemic index of a fast-food beef burger?

confidence_reason: No exact nutritional entry for the Jollibee Deluxe Jolliburger Single Patty exists in HPB Singapore Foodo, ICMR-NIN, or USDA Branded Foods. Nutrient values are adapted from USDA SR Legacy entry for a single-patty hamburger with condiments and vegetables (FDC 173965), which is the closest defensible analogue. GI is estimated from University of Sydney GI Database analogous fast-food burger data. Confidence is therefore medium rather than high.
notes: Vitamin D (vitamin_d_mcg) is -1 as it is not reported in the USDA SR Legacy reference entry for this food category. Vitamin E (vitamin_e_mg) is -1 as it is not reported in the USDA SR Legacy reference entry. Selenium (selenium_mcg) is -1 as it is not reported in the USDA SR Legacy reference entry. All other -1 values reflect nutrients not reported in the primary adapted source. Serving size of 185 g is estimated based on typical single-patty deluxe fast-food burger weight consistent with USDA reference portion data. GI of 66 is an analogous estimate from University of Sydney GI Database fast-food hamburger composite data; no direct measurement for the Jollibee Deluxe Jolliburger exists. Halal status confirmed per Jollibee Singapore cuisine tags from source data. The food is tagged as Fast Food / Burgers / Halal in the source field survey record. Price SGD 6.50 per unit at Jollibee Bugis Village as of source data collection.
